race.comment: INSAIN LADY (11) is back after a break of four-and-a-half months. Went close to a maiden win when finishing second over 1200m at Beaudesert. Placed when last resuming on the Sunshine Coast over 1000m. Low draw and should go close. CINCHICATED (9) resumed over 1100m at Rockhampton, finished third and has since switched yards. Has good speed and is expected to take catching. CHATSWORTH (1) has raced twice. Was third on debut then clocked in 3 lengths from the winner in seventh last time out over 1200m at Townsville. The blinkers go on. The solid effort on debut a good reference. BALKAN MELODY (10) is ticking along okay with two runs this time in. Improved last time out when third, beaten 4.5 lengths, at Rockhampton over 1200m. Has the speed to take catching. SENSEI GIRL (6) is overdue and looks tough to hold out.
